# Kanhaiya Kumar — Portfolio

> Portfolio of Kanhaiya Kumar, a Java backend developer building scalable microservices, REST APIs, and AI-powered systems with Spring Boot, Hexagonal Architecture, Google Gemini LLMs, and pgvector semantic search.
